nightly.claim_boundary: Local nightly artifacts prove command-level readiness; release streak credit requires tracked nightly CI evidence for the consecutive-pass window.
nightly.owner_action: Collect 30 additional consecutive successful nightly CI run(s); keep the scheduled/nightly lane green and refresh github_actions_ci_streak_evidence before release signoff.

pr.claim_boundary: Local PR gate reports prove command-level readiness; release streak credit requires tracked PR CI evidence for the consecutive-pass window.
pr.owner_action: Collect 30 additional consecutive successful PR CI run(s); keep the pull_request CI lane green and refresh github_actions_ci_streak_evidence before release signoff.

summary.nightly_owner_action: Collect 30 additional consecutive successful nightly CI run(s); keep the scheduled/nightly lane green and refresh github_actions_ci_streak_evidence before release signoff.
summary.pr_owner_action: Collect 30 additional consecutive successful PR CI run(s); keep the pull_request CI lane green and refresh github_actions_ci_streak_evidence before release signoff.
